description_long: This motorcycle features an elongated, chopper-style frame with a prominent, ribbed engine casing and a low-slung seat. The front fork is extended, giving the bike a stretched appearance, and the handlebars are high and wide, reminiscent of ape hanger designs. The wheels are large and spoked, with the front wheel being particularly oversized compared to the rear. The bodywork is minimal, exposing much of the mechanical structure, and the color scheme is a mix of metallic bronze and black, giving it a rugged, custom-built look. The exhaust pipes and other metallic components are visible, adding to the industrial aesthetic. There are no visible brand markings or license plates, and the overall design suggests a custom or classic chopper intended for urban cruising.
description: A custom chopper-style motorcycle with an elongated frame, high handlebars, and a metallic bronze and black finish. The design is minimal and exposes much of the engine and mechanical parts.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the extended front fork, large front wheel, and ribbed engine casing.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the low seat, rear wheel, and exposed frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the rear wheel, seat, and the curvature of the frame.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the high handlebars, front wheel, and engine details.
